result.summary: The page is mostly functional for a mobile casino interface, but there are several visual clipping and truncation issues affecting readability and polish. Most issues stem from horizontal carousel overflow not being handled gracefully.

issues.description: Game card titles on the right side of both carousels are abruptly cut off mid-word (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...' and 'MUNC MI...'). These truncations are jarring and make game names unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Ensure partial cards in horizontal scrolling carousels show enough of the card to be recognizable, or use a fade/gradient mask on the right edge to signal scrollability without cutting text mid-word.

issues.description: The top navigation tab 'Hot Ga...' is cut off at the right edge, hiding the full label ('Hot Games' presumably). Users cannot read the full category name.
issues.suggestion: Apply a horizontal fade/gradient on the nav bar's right edge to indicate scrollability, and ensure at least one full tab label is always visible before clipping begins.

issues.description: The right-edge game thumbnails in the 'Top Played New Games' section (e.g., 'Hypero...' and 'Dark Wate...') are cut off with no visual affordance like a scroll indicator or arrow to inform users they can scroll horizontally.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible right-arrow scroll control or a gradient overlay to clearly communicate horizontal scrollability to users.

issues.description: The bottom navigation bar 'Casino' item uses a different visual style (underlined text, colored icon) compared to other nav items, but this active-state differentiation is subtle and inconsistent with the other icon styles.
issues.suggestion: Apply a consistent active-state design across all bottom nav items, such as a highlighted background or more prominent indicator, to improve clarity.

issues.description: The promotional banner 'BET IT ON BLACK AND GOLD!' references Pittsburgh Penguins branding (black and gold), but the context may be confusing to users who don't associate it with a sports promotion versus a casino game.
issues.suggestion: Add a short subtitle or CTA button on the banner to clarify what the promotion entails (e.g., 'Play Penguins-themed slots now').
